egg-not-eggless-eggnog.name: egg Not' (eggless Eggnog)
instructions: Blend 2 cups milk, sugar, pudding mix, rum-flavored extract, nutmeg, allspice, and ginger in a blender on medium-high speed until smooth; pour into a pitcher. Stir remaining 3 cups milk into mixture. Refrigerate eggnog until thickened, at least 1 hour. Stir well before serving.

egg-omelette-and-vegetable-mousse-recipe.name: Egg, Omelette And Vegetable Mousse Recipe
egg-omelette-and-vegetable-mousse-recipe.original_name: Receta de mousse de huevo, tortilla y verduras
instructions: Engrasa el molde con aceite vegetal.
En un recipiente mezcla los huevos, la leche, la sal y la pimienta.
Once the ingredients are ready in the bin. Bat well to integrate.
cuts 1 tortilla of flour into 1 "strips
Para empezar a montar los muffins, enrolla la tortilla con tus dedos para que agarre la forma de espiral y colocar cada tira en cada uno de los orificios para los muffins.
Add finely minced red pepper, minced spinach, minced ham and pour the egg and milk mixture.
Hornea at 182 and 3) for 15 to 20 minutes or until they start to browse.
Unmold and serve. Enjoy!

eggless-chocolate-gelato.name: Eggless Chocolate Gelato
instructions: Bring 2 1/4 cups cold milk just to a boil in a medium-sized saucepan over medium heat.

While milk is heating, whisk together sugar, 1/4 cup cold milk, cornstarch, and salt in a medium bowl until smooth. Whisk into hot milk and bring to a boil over medium heat; let boil for 3 minutes, whisking constantly, until mixture is very thick. Remove from heat.
Place chocolate into a large bowl.
Bring remaining 1/2 cup cold milk just to a boil in a small saucepan over medium heat. Pour over chocolate and let stand until chocolate melts, about 1 minute. Whisk until smooth.

Stir chocolate mixture into cornstarch-milk mixture. Force through a fine mesh sieve into a mixing bowl. Let cool slightly, stirring frequently to prevent a skin from forming. Cover surface with wax paper. Chill in the refrigerator until cold, at least 1 1/2 hours.

Pour mixture into a gelato or ice cream maker. Freeze according to manufacturer's instructions, about 15 minutes. Transfer to an airtight container and place in the freezer if not serving immediately.

eggnog-bread-pudding-with-coquito-sauce.name: Eggnog Bread Pudding With Coquito Sauce
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Butter a 9x5-inch loaf pan.
Mix bread and raisins together in a bowl; transfer mixture to the loaf pan.
Beat eggnog, eggs, white sugar, and vanilla extract together in a separate bowl. Pour over the bread mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean, 40 to 45 minutes.
Melt brown sugar and butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Add cream and rum; simmer until sauce thickens and is reduced to 1 1/2 cups, about 5 minutes. Serve warm over the bread pudding.

eggplant-meatballs.name: Eggplant Meatballs
instructions: Preheat oven to 232°C (230 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil. Grease foil with olive oil.
Arrange eggplant halves cut-sides-down onto the prepared baking sheet. Pierce skin of eggplant several times with a fork.
Roast eggplant in preheated oven until soft, 30 to 40 minutes. Remove from oven and set aside to cool completely.
Scoop the flesh from the eggplant halves onto a cutting board; chop into small chunks and put into a large mixing bowl.

Mix ground turkey, carrot, onion, Parmesan cheese, egg, garlic, basil, parsley, oregano, sea salt, and black pepper with the eggplant chunks until ingredients are somewhat evenly mixed together. Gently mix almond flour into the eggplant mixture; scoop with an ice cream scoop onto the prepared baking sheet.
Reduce oven heat to 177°C (175 degrees C) and bake meatballs in oven for 15 minutes, flip the meatballs, and bake until browned and no longer pink in the center, about 10 minutes more.
While the meatballs bake, heat marinara sauce in saucepan over medium-low heat until hot; add baked meatballs to the sauce and stir to coat.

english-muffin-breakfast-pizzas.name: English Muffin Breakfast Pizzas

ingredients.item: Odom's tennessee pride® mild country sausage

instructions: Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler. Place English muffin halves on a baking sheet; set aside.

Coat a large skillet with cooking spray over medium-high heat. Add sausage, onion, bell pepper, and mushrooms; cook, stirring occasionally, until sausage is crumbled and vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes. Drain. Transfer sausage and vegetables to a plate; keep warm.

Reduce heat to medium. Pour eggs into the skillet; season with salt and black pepper. Cook until until edges and bottoms begin to set. Gently stir to scramble; continue cooking until set. Transfer eggs to a plate; keep warm.

Broil English muffin halves in the preheated oven until toasted, about 2 minutes. Divide and top halves with sausage mixture, scrambled eggs, and cheese. Broil until cheese melts, about 3 minutes. Serve immediately.

english-soup-with-strawberries-teleculin.name: English Soup With Strawberries
instructions: Light a pot with the milk and vanilla essence and let it boil. Apart, mix the yolks with sugar and flour. Lay a shell of warm milk on the previous mixture and stir until you get a homogeneous preparation.
Transfer the preparation to the pot with the remaining milk, mix well and let cook, always stirring until thicken. Remove and reserve.

In individual cups, have a layer of toothpicks, previously passed by strawberry juice. Place the strawberries sliced around and cover with the cream. Decorate with the remaining strawberries and lead to cold for at least 1 hour.

entremeada-stew-with-white-beans-telecul.name: Entremeada Stew With White Beans
instructions: Take a pot to the fire with the olive oil, onion and chopped garlic and let it saute slightly. Add the intermeada cut into pieces and let cook for 15 minutes, in medium light and stirring regularly.

Add the cut sausage to slices, the meat broth and the laurel, cover and let cook, in mild heat, another 30 minutes, adding more broth if necessary. Add the chopped tomatoes without skin and seeds and tomato pulp, rectify the spices, add spicy to taste and let cook another 15 minutes. Then add the bean run and some parsley and let cook another 5 minutes.
However, peel the potatoes, cut them in slices and bake them in salty water. Drain them, put them on a platter, add the mixture of beans on top and serve decorated to taste.

escarole-with-bacon-dates-and-warm-walnu.name: Escarole With Bacon, Dates, And Warm Walnut Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Walnut oil or extra-virgin olive oil

instructions: Combine escarole, dates, and walnuts in large bowl. Cook bacon in medium skillet over medium-high heat until brown and crisp. Using slotted spoon, transfer bacon to paper towels to drain. Add bacon to bowl with salad.

Discard drippings from skillet; add walnut oil. Place over low heat. Add shallot; sauté until soft, about 3 minutes. Remove skillet from heat; add vinegar and whisk to blend. Season vinaigrette with sea salt and black pepper. Gradually add warm dressing to salad, tossing to coat. Divide among plates.

evening-in-kingston.name: Evening In Kingston
instructions: Combine rum, Campari, and vermouth in a large pitcher; chill until very cold, at least 2 hours and up to 1 day.
For each cocktail, pour 2 oz. rum mixture into a Collins glass filled with ice and top off with 2–3 oz. chilled sparkling wine. Garnish with an orange twist, if desired.

muceddere-pilaf-lezzet.name: English
instructions: 1. Spread redbiber into a pot full of water until it will cover the green lentil.
2. Disinfect and hold the water.
3. Peel onions and roast in the form of ring and wrapped in olive oil.
4.   1 tablespoon of water is added with water and continue roasting.
5. Add 2 cups of water, salt and pepper on it and add bulguru after boiling.
6. Add cooked and boiled lentils for 4-5 minutes.
7. Bake until it attracts water in the jealous fire.
8. blend the rice for up to 10 minutes.
9.   Serve hot.
